utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five items are present. Each item is fully specified with relevant details and costs: (1) health_coverage includes plan name, type, monthly cost, currency, and features; (2) property_coverage includes plan name, type, monthly cost, currency, coverage limit, and features; (3) travel_coverage includes plan name, type, monthly cost, currency, and features; (4) additional_services includes description, monthly cost, and currency; (5) total_budget includes monthly and annual cost, currency, savings, and comparison. All required details are complete and relevant to what should be covered under each item.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main insurance components: health_coverage (LifeFirst Standard Plan), property_coverage (HomeFirst Standard Coverage), and travel_coverage (PrimeTravel Premium Plan). According to the ground-truth data: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under 'primary_health_coverage' (physical_health and mental_health) with a rating of 9. HomeFirst Standard Coverage is found under 'property_protection.home_content' with a rating of 8. PrimeTravel Premium Plan is listed under 'mobility_coverage.travel_insurance' with a rating of 6. No other items in the final plan require mapping to ratings since 'additional_services' and 'total_budget' are cost summaries without corresponding rating entries.
